Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x67EF "REVS-0400-67EF" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Revs.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
